name: INTEGRA LIFESCIENCES HOLDINGS CORP
summary: PART I OVERVIEW Integra LifeSciences Holdings Corporation is a global medical technology company dedicated to restoring lives. We are advancing transformational care through impactful innovation and our portfolio of highly differentiated technologies is trusted by healthcare professionals to deliver transformative care.
